name: Lucy's Salmon Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons butter, then sauté celery and onions.
2. Add potatoes and enough water to cover. Simmer until the potatoes are tender.
3. Melt the remaining 2 tablespoons butter. Blend in 2 tablespoons flour to make a roux.
4. Add the roux and evaporated milk to the potatoes. Heat until thickened over medium heat, stirring constantly.
5. Add seasonings, salmon, and tomatoes. Heat until steamy. Do not boil.
6. Add cheese just before serving.
